nodes.context: Oldest Wo Group triad in Hong Kong, involved in extortion, drug trafficking, gambling, prostitution.
Group of triad societies to which Wo Shing Wo belongs.
Rival triad group to Wo Shing Wo, active in Ireland, Netherlands, UK, and globally.
Triad group that battled Wo Shing Wo in Amsterdam for heroin trade.
Triad group whose members attacked Wo Shing Wo members in 2006.
Ally of Wo Shing Wo according to infobox.
Rival triad group to Wo Shing Wo according to infobox.
Triad founded in 1908, from which Wo Shing Wo in Toronto was established as an international branch.
Triad group mentioned in context of Philip Wong, a 'white paper fan' (business adviser) for Shui Fong.

edges.evidence_quote: Wo Shing Wo or WSW ... is the oldest of the Wo Group triad societies
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo is a member of the Wo Group triad societies.

edges.evidence_quote: the activities of the Wo Shing Wo and their rival 14K
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo and 14K are rivals in Ireland.

edges.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, the group battled the 14K and Ah Kong for control of the heroin trade in Amsterdam.
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo battled 14K for heroin trade control in Amsterdam in the 1970s.

edges.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo has more recently also closely cooperated with the 14K.
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo and 14K have recently cooperated closely.

edges.evidence_quote: Wo Shing Wo footsoldiers ambushed 14K members in a machete attack on Glasgow's Sauchiehall Street in July 2003
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo attacked 14K members in Glasgow in 2003.

edges.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo in Scotland has cooperated with the 14K in cigarette smuggling.
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo and 14K cooperated in cigarette smuggling in Scotland.

edges.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, the group battled the 14K and Ah Kong for control of the heroin trade in Amsterdam.
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo battled Ah Kong for heroin trade control in Amsterdam in the 1970s.

edges.evidence_quote: Wo Shing Wo members are attacked by members of Wo on Lok.
edges.context: Wo On Lok members attacked Wo Shing Wo members.
Big Circle Gang is listed as an ally of Wo Shing Wo in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K , Ah Kong , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok
edges.context: Sun Yee On is listed as a rival of Wo Shing Wo in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo was established in Toronto in 1930 as an international branch of the Wo Hop To
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo in Toronto was established as a branch of Wo Hop To.
